findings.title: ARIA input fields must have an accessible name
findings.actual_results:
URL: https://www.samcomf.com/
Ensure every ARIA input field has an accessible name
- aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute
- "Invest Now Invest Now Invest Now Invest Now" in "section"
findings.incorrect_code: <div class="slick-track" role="listbox" style="opacity: 1; width: 10980px; transform: translate3d(-2440px, 0px, 0px); transition: transform 500ms;">
findings.recommendation: ARIA input fields must have an accessible name

any.message: aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
Element has no title attribute

raw_nodes.html: <div class="slick-track" role="listbox" style="opacity: 1; width: 10980px; transform: translate3d(-2440px, 0px, 0px); transition: transform 500ms;">
raw_nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
  aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
  Element has no title attribute

findings.title: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds
findings.actual_results:
URL: https://www.samcomf.com/
Accessibility issue detected for rule "color-contrast".
- Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.73 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #4788c8, font size: 10.5pt (14px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.82 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #3f86cc, font size: 9.8pt (13px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- Element has insufficient color contrast of 3.82 (foreground color: #ffffff, background color: #3f86cc, font size: 9.0pt (12px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
- "Distributor corner" in "header"
- "Contact us" in "header"
- "+91 63572 22000" in "header"
- "Copyright © 2024 Samco Asset Management Private Ltd. | All Rights Reserved" in "page section"
- "Statutory Details" in "page section"
findings.incorrect_code:
Distributor corner Contact us +91 63572 22000
Copyright © 2024 Samco Asset Management Private Ltd. | All Rights Reserved
Statutory Details
findings.recommendation: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds

findings.title: Form elements must have labels
findings.actual_results:
URL: https://www.samcomf.com/
Ensure every form element has a label
- Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label> Element does not have an explicit <label> aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty Element has no title attribute Element has an empty placeholder attribute Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"
- "name" in "Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "subcribe" in "Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "mobile" in "Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
- "city" in "Samco Flexi Cap Fund"
findings.incorrect_code:
<input type="text" name="name" id="name" class="form-input" placeholder="" required="">

<input type="email" name="subcribe" id="subcribe" class="form-input" placeholder="" required="">

<input maxlength="10" pattern="[0-9]{10}" type="tel" name="mobile" id="mobile" class="form-input" placeholder="" required="">

<input type="text" name="city" id="city" class="form-input" placeholder="" required="">

findings.title: Interactive controls must not be nested
findings.actual_results:
URL: https://www.samcomf.com/
Ensure interactive controls are not nested as they are not always announced by screen readers or can cause focus problems for assistive technologies
- Using a negative tabindex on an element inside an interactive control does not prevent assistive technologies from focusing the element (even with aria-hidden="true")
- "Invest Now" in "section"
findings.incorrect_code: <div class="p-relative slick-slide slick-current slick-active" data-slick-index="1" aria-hidden="false" tabindex="-1" role="option" aria-describedby="slick-slide01" style="width: 1220px;">
findings.recommendation: Interactive controls must not be nested

relatedNodes.html: Invest Now

any.message: Using a negative tabindex on an element inside an interactive control does not prevent assistive technologies from focusing the element (even with aria-hidden="true")

raw_nodes.html: <div class="p-relative slick-slide slick-current slick-active" data-slick-index="1" aria-hidden="false" tabindex="-1" role="option" aria-describedby="slick-slide01" style="width: 1220px;">
raw_nodes.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Using a negative tabindex on an element inside an interactive control does not prevent assistive technologies from focusing the element (even with aria-hidden="true")
